TEST.0.title: 2026 Division C Regional Test - February Extra

CIPHER.464.cipherString: An elephant can trumpet and shake the earth but not the self-possession of the ants who hold it.
CIPHER.464.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Aristocrat message. What does it say?

CIPHER.450.cipherString: Part of filmmaking is always a guessing game, and part of it is always a game of trust.
CIPHER.450.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Checkerboard message onto the screen—decode Greg Kinnear with a polybius key of WORKMANSHIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.450.author: Greg Kinnear

CIPHER.460.cipherString: We must thank to all the failed people in the history as they showed us the true way to success!
CIPHER.460.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Mehmet Murat ildan encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.460.author: Mehmet Murat ildan

CIPHER.449.cipherString: We cannot live in this reality. If we want to save the future, then we have to repair the past.
CIPHER.449.question: Scratched onto the lens of an abandoned telescope, decode this Complete Columnar quote by Jean-Luc Picard. The quote has SAVE THE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.449.author: Jean-Luc Picard

CIPHER.442.cipherString: Anonymity gives people power to do wrong things, without facing the consequences of their actions.
CIPHER.442.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Aristocrat version of De philosopher DJ Kyos using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.442.author: De philosopher DJ Kyos

CIPHER.445.cipherString: Mankind was not needed to bring order to the world.
CIPHER.445.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Daniel Quinn, encoded as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.445.author: Daniel Quinn

CIPHER.458.cipherString: Throw yourself into each moment as if it were the only one that really existed. Work and work hard.
CIPHER.458.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by Jacques Lusseyran using the Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.458.author: Jacques Lusseyran

CIPHER.461.cipherString: Nobody has ever said the negotiation would be straightforward and simple.
CIPHER.461.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Chris Grayling, encoded in a Porta using a keyword of PREFIX. What does it say?
CIPHER.461.author: Chris Grayling

CIPHER.452.cipherString: In short, as critical as it is for us to speak up as individuals, our real power emerges when we act collectively.
CIPHER.452.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by Tessa Khan, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.452.author: Tessa Khan

CIPHER.463.cipherString: Paradise is for those who control their anger.
CIPHER.463.question: Your Bunsen burner's flame suddenly spelled this Fractionated Morse message by Koran. You are told that the quote starts with PARAD. What does it say?
CIPHER.463.author: Koran

CIPHER.454.cipherString: Society is itself a kind of organism, an enormously powerful one, but unfortunately not a very wise one.
CIPHER.454.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Isaac Asimov, written in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word one twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.454.author: Isaac Asimov

CIPHER.440.cipherString: It's not really a rule--its more like a trend.
CIPHER.440.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Baconian code by Larry Wall. You are told that the deciphered text starts with ITSN. What does it say?
CIPHER.440.author: Larry Wall

CIPHER.444.cipherString: Challenges are what make life interesting and overcoming them is what makes life meaningful.
CIPHER.444.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Joshua J. Marine, written as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains what twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.444.author: Joshua J. Marine

CIPHER.455.cipherString: The superior man is modest in his speech, but exceeds in his actions.
CIPHER.455.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Confucius, encrypted using a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SANITY and polybius key of HYPNOTIZED. What does it say?
CIPHER.455.author: Confucius

CIPHER.446.cipherString: I don't think people buy technology products because of the personalities of the people behind them.
CIPHER.446.question: A mysterious app update added this Aristocrat lock screen—it's actually Jim Balsillie's quote using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.446.author: Jim Balsillie

CIPHER.438.question: A quote by Jimi Hendrix has been encoded using the Hill Cipher with a keyword of PROD for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.438.author: Jimi Hendrix

CIPHER.447.cipherString: Is it surprising that modern English land law should resemble a chaos rather than a system?
CIPHER.447.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Edward Jenks, written as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has ENGLISH somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.447.author: Edward Jenks

CIPHER.453.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Cryptarithm banner. What do the values 24742 563189 09 decode to?

CIPHER.448.cipherString: Entrenamos la mente para que podamos disfrutar de una mayor paz, felicidad, sabiduría y ecuanimidad.
CIPHER.448.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Allan Lokos in Spanish encoded in a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.448.author: Allan Lokos
CIPHER.448.translation: We train the mind so that we can enjoy greater peace, happiness, wisdom & equanimity.

CIPHER.459.cipherString: If you wish to subject everything to yourself, subject yourself first to reason.
CIPHER.459.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Seneca, encoded using a Checkerboard Cipher with a Polybius key of MARVELOUS. What does it say?
CIPHER.459.author: Seneca

CIPHER.457.cipherString: Things are never quite as scary when you've got a best friend.
CIPHER.457.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this Complete Columnar quote by Bill Watterson. The quote has VERQUIT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.457.author: Bill Watterson

CIPHER.441.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's encoded in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 56773 2869 1046 decode to?

CIPHER.439.cipherString: A lot of people do not muster the courage to live their dreams because they are afraid to die.
CIPHER.439.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Les Brown, written in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains THEY. What does it say?
CIPHER.439.author: Les Brown

CIPHER.443.cipherString: Total absence of humor renders life impossible.
CIPHER.443.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Sidonie Gabrielle Colette, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution Cipher using a keyword of CORTEX and Polybius key of CARBONIZED. What does it say?
CIPHER.443.author: Sidonie Gabrielle Colette

CIPHER.462.cipherString: Everyone in society should be a role model, not only for their own self-respect, but for respect from others.
CIPHER.462.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Aristocrat encoded quote by Barry Bonds using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.462.author: Barry Bonds

CIPHER.451.cipherString: Why is the right place always so terrifying?
CIPHER.451.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote by the video game Destiny written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.451.author: the video game Destiny

CIPHER.456.cipherString: There's only one trick in software, and that is using a piece of software that's already been written.
CIPHER.456.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by Bill Gates, encrypted with an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.456.author: Bill Gates
